title: Smoky Spring Onion Stir Fry
description: A flavorful and healthy Chinese stir-fry recipe made with smoky vegetables, crunchy spring onions, and Mexican spices.
instructions: Heat 1 tbsp of oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the sliced ginger and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the sliced smoky onions and cook for 2-3 minutes, until slightly caramelized.
Add the thinly sliced spring onions and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
In a small bowl, whisk together soy sauce, rice vinegar, honey, and Mexican oregano.
Pour the sauce over the vegetables and stir-fry for 1-2 minutes, until well combined.
Add the chili flakes (if using) and stir-fry for an additional 30 seconds.
Transfer the stir-fry to a serving platter and garnish with additional spring onions (if desired).
